summary: CRITICAL GAPS: (1) Workflow uses unpinned `actions/checkout@v4`—task explicitly requires full-length SHA pins; (2) MatrixGenerator.Tests.ps1 missing entirely, blocking TDD validation (tests must run via `Invoke-Pester`); (3) Fixture files referenced but not provided. PowerShell code is solid—proper Set-StrictMode, error handling, modular functions—but test-harness.ps1 has unused Compare-Entry (lines defining it vs. only using Get-Sig), regex parsing is fragile. Incomplete delivery breaks two explicit requirements.
